seoTitle: Cowwarr vs Craigie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cowwarr and Craigie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cowwarr and Craigie.
heading: Cowwarr vs Craigie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cowwarr, Victoria and Craigie, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Craigie has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cowwarr (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cowwarr or Craigie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cowwarr has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Craigie scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cowwarr scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Craigie scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cowwarr or Craigie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Craigie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
